ProjectList.title: 12th of October Complete Primary School
ProjectList.text: The 12th of October Primary School was designed with the aim of providing quality education for school-aged children in the local community. The project creation process involved several important stages, from the initial idea conception to the final implementation.

sections.p: The creation of the 12 de Outubro Primary School was a strategic process aimed at meeting the need for quality education in the local community. The project involved a series of fundamental steps, from identifying the need to implementing and opening the school. Below is the detailed journey that led to the realization of this important educational project.

The creation of the 12 de Outubro Primary School was a strategic process aimed at meeting the need for quality education in the local community. The project involved a series of fundamental steps, from identifying the need to implementing and opening the school. Below is the detailed journey that led to the realization of this important educational project.

After identifying the need, a detailed plan was created for the establishment of the school. This planning involved clearly defining the institution's mission and vision, which focused on providing children with a solid educational foundation and ethical values. Additionally, studies were conducted to determine the number of classes, the curriculum to be followed, the necessary teaching resources, and the ideal physical structure to house school activities. The plan also included the development of a timeline for construction and the gradual implementation of activities.

HeroSection.p: Founded in 1998, Arcus Consultores operates as a consulting firm in architectural and urban planning, multidisciplinary engineering, management, and development.
